programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A look at a witness account that could lead a small-town police department in the wrong direction as it tries to solve the murder of a friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: This true-crime series hosted by Lt. Joe Kenda, one of America's toughest detectives, features incredibly disturbing and mind-blowing cases from across the country. Lt. Kenda expertly guides us through the complex twists and turns of these bizarre crimes.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A gunman shoots a hero fireman dead in his own driveway. Police focus their investigation on the unusual firearm used to commit the crime and an odd trail of clues left behind by the victim himself.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End
programme.desc: In the coastal town of Leland, N.C., a missing woman is found dead in a swamp; as detectives speak with the victim's friends and family, they begin to unravel the truth behind a horrifying murder.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End
programme.sub-title: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In Stamping Ground, Ky., a young woman's dead body is found late at night by her brother and father; when detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Forty-seven-year-old mother Joyce Aparo is found strangled to death near a road 70 miles from her home in Glastonbury, Conn.; the investigation leads detectives into a dark world of abuse, sexual obsession and lies.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: University of Miami football player Marlin Barnes and his friend, Timwanika Lumpkins, are beaten to death in Barnes' apartment; as detectives search for the killer, the crime sends shockwaves through the campus and community.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Ann Anastasi returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him; police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement; later, they discover a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Hollywood golden boy Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player, goes missing; for years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters hold fast to their secrets.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A couple escapes the dangers of the big city and moves to the country; however, they begin to suspect their new neighbors are involved in the drug trade, leading to a bloody conflict with children caught in the crossfire.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight-knit community; when residents take sides, good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A U.S. Army veteran goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome; when a child's birthday gift goes missing, it takes only 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: In a tight-knit community, a new family commits a slight against a community member causing all of their neighbors to turn against them and leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: At the cookie factory, friendships rise fast but so do rivalries; what starts as harmless gossip between co-workers soon turns sour; when jealousy and ambition boil over, the sweet life at the plant ends in cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: A West Philadelphia neighborhood is left reeling when a high school track star, who had her eyes set on Olympic glory, disappears without a trace.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: A deserted, bloody vehicle makes detectives suspect murder; their investigation plunges them into Florida pageantry's cutthroat world and an unlikely suspect, unraveling a sordid tale of deceit and a shocking fall from grace.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: The Bobbies function like a high school sorority; they're a philanthropic organization also known for wild initiation rituals and social exclusivity; when someone murders one of their own, every Bobbie becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Christa Pike is the only woman on death row in Tennessee; in 1995, she is introduced to Satanism, and her fascination grows until it comes to a deadly head in the woods one night in January.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Las Vegas is a playground for top female fitness competitors; winning is important, and when jealousy spirals out of control, one woman loses her life.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In May 2002, a couple goes missing in Ocean City, Maryland, almost as if they vanished into thin air, until a random, late-night burglary leads police to discover a tale of deception, brutality and savagery.

programme.desc: An aspiring model, Kimberly Pandelios, accepts an offer to pose in lingerie for a mysterious photographer, then disappears; years later, a young woman contacts the police when she begins to suspect that her boyfriend may have been the killer.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company
programme.desc: Close-knit coworkers are devastated when one of their own is found dead near a soccer field at the edge of their quiet Indiana town; investigators ask whether this murder was a random act of violence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder Loves Company
programme.desc: In Texarkana, Ark., a murder within a square dancing community leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibis and potential motives, including love, jealousy and money.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Devil Speaks
programme.desc: Elderly couple Roy and Angie Woodley are found brutally stabbed to death in their Fresno, Calif., home; believing the crime to be a robbery-gone-wrong, detectives soon realize the perpetrator may in fact be a family member with a grudge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Devil Speaks
programme.desc: Melissa Atkins is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tenn.; the investigation zeroes in on two individuals and involves a series of recorded phone calls exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Devil Speaks
programme.desc: In Nanuet, N.Y., Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her home and succumbs to her injuries after being rushed to the hospital; investigators discover that Michelle made a secret recording in her final moments that reveals her killer's identity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: The disappearance of a popular resident of Eastman, Ga., rocks the small town; as the search for Russell Ray intensifies, any hope of finding him alive dwindles after police make a horrific discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: Single mother Brandi Peters and her three young children are brutally murdered inside their Tallahassee, Fla., home in November 2010; detectives are shocked to uncover a killer who is a real-life monster hiding in plain sight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: In 2007, Marilou Johnson's millionaire boyfriend, Roger Blanchard, reports her missing; police have little to go on in their search for the mother of three until a witness steps forward.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: A religious community mourns an elderly couple after they turn up viciously murdered in their home; in a race to capture the killer, investigators discover that their deaths weave into a larger web of lies and wicked desires.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: Christi Flynn meets three shady strangers at a bar and finds herself in the fight of her life as they kidnap her and take her on a tortuous journey throughout the Arkansas forests.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: Penny Waldroup takes all the right steps to leave her abusive husband, Brad, but she still must see him for their children; on a visit to his remote mountain home, she's about to find out just how far he'll go to make sure she never escapes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: Successful real estate agent Beverly Carter heads to the country to show a rural home to some prospective buyers; when she arrives, she soon learns that this showing will be anything but routine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: Residents of a quaint village are terrified when a local innkeeper and two others are found brutally murdered; detectives must follow the depraved killer into the woods at night.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: Only if There's Something in It for Me
programme.desc: While being questioned in the abduction of an Anchorage barista, a young local businessman starts negotiating with investigators to reveal details of a depraved secret life as one of America's most meticulous and psychopathic serial killers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: Now They Lay Me Down to Sleep, Part 1
programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution; after a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath

programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution; after a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes, and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: I Dug a Hole and Said a Prayer

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend; twelve years later, he is back in court with a chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: I Could Hear Her Calling My Name
programme.desc: A girl disappears after school and her last known steps are caught on surveillance cameras; these cameras lead investigators to two dark minds that carefully plotted one of the most sinister, depraved crimes imaginable.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A Colorado woman is missing and her roommate may be a rare female psychopath and a skilled manipulator.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When a man disappears in Hagerstown, Md., the only clue to his whereabouts is the white BMW he abandons at an apartment complex; investigators turn to CCTV footage to piece together his final movements and unravel a deadly plot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: After the shooting of a military veteran in his own home, detectives hunt a trail of CCTV across Kansas City to find his elusive killers; grainy footage reveals a connection between the hooded assailant and the driver of a silver BMW.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When a gunman shoots Reggie Ward at a gas station in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, witnesses and the victim's girlfriend, are unable to identify the shooter; investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage and GPS data to find an unexpected suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In Fernandina Beach, Fla., cosmetologist Joleen Cummings goes missing after an appointment, her last at Tangles Salon; CCTV footage shows her car in an isolated parking lot in the middle of the night; a closer look reveals an unlikely suspect.

programme.desc: After the shooting of a military veteran in his own home, detectives hunt a trail of CCTV across Kansas City to find his elusive killers; grainy footage reveals a connection between the hooded assailant and the driver of a silver BMW.
